category_sources: Official chkrootkit homepage says it locally checks for signs of a rootkit and lists its detection components.
source_facts.description says chkrootkit is a rootkit detector.
display_name_sources: Official chkrootkit homepage and README use the name chkrootkit.
docs_sources: Official README documents installation, usage, supported systems, output messages, and reporting.
Official chkrootkit homepage links to its README for more details.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official chkrootkit download page distributes source tarballs, but no official source-control repository was identified.
tags_sources: Official chkrootkit README describes checks for rootkits, worms, LKMs, trojaned commands, and Unix-like supported systems.
